Welcome Email Sequence: Tirak Dream Journeys

Campaign Focus: VIP Companion Onboarding (Post-Sign-Up Nurture)
Audience: Companions who just completed sign-up (approved or pending approval)
Goal: Reduce friction, increase first booking rate, build community
Sequence: 2 emails (Welcome T+0, First Booking Tips T+2 days)

Email #1: Welcome Email (T+0 - Immediate After Sign-Up)

Subject Line Options (A/B Test)

Subject A (Direct Confirmation):
“Nok, you’re approved! Here’s how to get your first booking.”

Subject B (Empowerment + Action):
“Welcome to Tirak. Your first ฿1,500-3,000 starts now.”

Subject C (Community + Support):
“You’re in! Join 50+ Bangkok companions earning fair income.”

Recommended: Subject A (confirmation + clear next step)

Preview Text

“Your Tirak profile is live. Set your rates, toggle availability, get booked.”

Email Body

FROM: Tirak Team hello@tirak.com
TO: [Companion Name]
SUBJECT: [Subject A/B/C from above]

สวัสดี [Name]! 🎉

You’re officially a Tirak companion.

Your profile is live. Bangkok travelers can now find you, book you, and pay you 80-85% of your earnings (not 60-70%).

This is your platform. You control your rates. You control your schedule. You keep your money.

Let’s get you your first booking.

Step 1: Complete Your Profile (Takes 5 Minutes)

A complete profile gets 3-4x more bookings than an incomplete one.

What to add:

  1. Profile photo (friendly, clear, recent—iPhone selfie is perfect)
  2. Bio (100-200 words: Who are you? Why Bangkok? What makes you different?)
  3. Experience descriptions (3-5 experiences you offer: street food tour, bar crawl, temple walk, shopping spree, etc.)
  4. Pricing (฿1,200-2,500 for 4-hour experiences is standard; set yours based on effort/expertise)
  5. Availability (Toggle your calendar: weekends only? full-time? random days?)

👉 [Complete Your Profile Now]
(Link: https://tirak.com/dashboard/profile)

Pro tip: Travelers book companions with authentic photos. No professional shoots needed. Show your personality: selfies at street food stalls, rooftop bars, temples, coffee shops. Real > polished.

Step 2: Set Your Rates (You’re In Control)

What Bangkok companions are charging:

  • Street Food Tour (3-4 hours): ฿1,200-1,800
  • Bar Crawl (4-5 hours): ฿1,800-2,500
  • Temple & Culture Walk (4-5 hours): ฿1,500-2,200
  • Shopping & Local Markets (3-4 hours): ฿1,200-1,800
  • Custom Full-Day (8 hours): ฿3,500-5,000

Your take-home (after Tirak’s 15% commission):

  • ฿1,500 experience = You keep ฿1,275
  • ฿2,000 experience = You keep ฿1,700
  • ฿2,500 experience = You keep ฿2,125

Remember: You can adjust rates anytime. Start competitive, then raise rates as you build 5-star reviews.

👉 [Set Your Rates]
(Link: https://tirak.com/dashboard/pricing)

Step 3: Toggle Your Availability (Be Discoverable)

Travelers search by available dates. If your calendar is empty, they can’t book you.

How it works:

  • Toggle ON for days you’re available (green = bookable)
  • Toggle OFF for days you’re busy (gray = not shown to travelers)
  • Update anytime (even 1 hour before—instant availability changes)

Pro tip: Open your calendar for the next 14 days right now. Travelers book 3-7 days in advance, so being available soon = more bookings.

👉 [Open Your Calendar]
(Link: https://tirak.com/dashboard/availability)

Step 4: Join the Bangkok Companion WhatsApp Group

You’re not alone. 52 Bangkok companions are already sharing tips, asking questions, and supporting each other.

What happens in the group:

  • Share experience ideas (“What’s your best street food route?”)
  • Ask pricing questions (“Is ฿1,800 too high for a 4-hour bar crawl?”)
  • Troubleshoot traveler issues (“How do I handle a no-show?”)
  • Celebrate wins (“Just got my first 5-star review!”)
  • Monthly meetups (coffee, Q&A, networking)

👉 [Join WhatsApp Group]
(Link: https://chat.whatsapp.com/tirak-companions-bangkok)

Important: No spam. No ads. No scams. Only Bangkok companions helping Bangkok companions. We kick anyone who violates community rules.

Step 5: Get Your First Booking (Here’s How)

3 ways travelers find you:

1. Search & Filters
Travelers search “Bangkok street food” or “bar crawl” → Your profile appears if you offer it.
Action: Make sure your experience titles and descriptions use keywords travelers search for.

2. “New to Tirak” Featured Section
New companions get boosted visibility for 14 days.
Action: Complete your profile NOW to maximize your 14-day boost.

3. “Available This Weekend” Spotlight
Travelers booking last-minute see you first.
Action: Toggle availability for the next 7 days (especially weekends).

Pro tip: Your first booking usually happens within 3-7 days if your profile is complete and calendar is open. The faster you finish setup, the faster you earn.

What to Expect (First Booking Timeline)

Day 1 (Today): Complete profile, set rates, open calendar
Day 2-3: Profile indexed in search, visible to travelers
Day 4-7: First booking inquiry (traveler messages you)
Day 8-10: First booking confirmed (deposit held in escrow)
Day 11-14: First experience completed, reviewed, paid out

Average time to first booking: 7 days (if profile is complete)

Your First Booking = 100% Earnings (No Commission!)

Early Access Bonus: If you signed up during early access, your first 5 bookings = ฿0 commission.

That means:

  • ฿1,500 booking = You keep ฿1,500 (not ฿1,275)
  • ฿2,000 booking = You keep ฿2,000 (not ฿1,700)
  • ฿2,500 booking = You keep ฿2,500 (not ฿2,125)

Total bonus value: ฿1,125-2,250 extra over your first 5 bookings.

How to claim: Nothing. It’s automatic. Your first 5 bookings will show “100% earnings” in your dashboard.

Questions? We’re Here.

Reply to this email and I’ll personally answer within 2 hours.

Join WhatsApp group for peer support (52 Bangkok companions ready to help).

Visit Help Center for guides, FAQs, and troubleshooting: [Link: https://tirak.com/help]

Quick Wins (Do These Now)

✅ Add 1 profile photo (iPhone selfie, 5 seconds)
✅ Write a 100-word bio (who you are, why Bangkok, what you love, 3 minutes)
✅ Create 1 experience (street food tour, bar crawl, temple walk—start with your favorite, 5 minutes)
✅ Set your rates (check what others charge, price competitively, 2 minutes)
✅ Open your calendar for next 14 days (toggle availability, 1 minute)
✅ Join WhatsApp group (meet other companions, 30 seconds)

Total time: 15 minutes.
Result: Your profile is discoverable, bookable, and earning-ready.

👉 [Go to Dashboard]
(Link: https://tirak.com/dashboard)

This Is Just the Start

You’re now part of a movement.

A movement toward fair pay for Thai companions.

A movement where Bangkok locals control their earnings.

A movement where platforms serve you, not exploit you.

Welcome to Tirak. Let’s make you some money.

ขอบคุณครับ/ค่ะ,

[Founder Name]
Founder, Tirak Dream Journeys

P.S. — Need inspiration? Check out Nok’s profile (our first companion): [Link]. She went from 0 to 8 bookings in her first week. You can too.

Email Footer

Tirak Dream Journeys
Bangkok, Thailand
[Unsubscribe] | [Update Preferences] | [View in Browser]

Email #2: First Booking Tips (T+2 Days After Sign-Up)

Subject Line Options (A/B Test)

Subject A (Urgency + Action):
“Nok, your calendar is empty. Here’s how to fix that.”

Subject B (Social Proof + Encouragement):
“3 companions got their first booking this week. Here’s what they did.”

Subject C (Direct Value):
“5 tips to get booked faster (from companions earning ฿10K+/month)”

Recommended: Subject C (actionable, value-driven, specific)

Preview Text

“Real tips from Bangkok companions who went 0 to 5 bookings in 2 weeks.”

Email Body

FROM: Tirak Team hello@tirak.com
TO: [Companion Name]
SUBJECT: [Subject A/B/C from above]

[Name],

It’s been 2 days since you joined Tirak.

Question: Have you gotten your first booking inquiry yet?

If yes → Amazing! Skip this email (or read it anyway for tips on booking #2-5).

If no → Here’s why… and how to fix it.

Why You Haven’t Been Booked Yet (And How to Fix It)

I talked to 10 Bangkok companions who went from 0 bookings → 5 bookings in 2 weeks. Here’s what they did differently:

1. They Completed Their Profile (You Might Not Have)

The problem:
Travelers see incomplete profiles (no photo, no bio, no experiences) and skip you. They don’t trust you. They book someone else.

The fix:
👉 Add a profile photo (iPhone selfie, 30 seconds)
👉 Write a 100-word bio (who you are, why you love Bangkok, what makes you different)
👉 Create 3 experiences (street food, bar crawl, temple walk—use templates in dashboard)

Pro tip from Nok (8 bookings/month):

“I uploaded a selfie from Chatuchak Market holding mango sticky rice. Travelers loved it. My bio says: ‘Former hotel manager who knows Bangkok’s hidden gems. I’ll show you street food Thais eat, not tourist traps.’ Done. Booked 3 times in 5 days.”

👉 [Complete Your Profile Now]
(Link: https://tirak.com/dashboard/profile)

2. They Opened Their Calendar (Yours Might Be Closed)

The problem:
Travelers search by available dates. If your calendar is gray/closed, you don’t show up in search results.

The fix:
👉 Toggle availability for the next 14 days (green = bookable)
👉 Open weekends first (70% of bookings happen Fri-Sun)
👉 Update daily (instant availability = more last-minute bookings)

Pro tip from Pim (12 bookings/month):

“I was waiting for bookings before opening my calendar. Big mistake. Once I toggled ON for weekends, I got 3 inquiries in 2 days. Travelers want to book you NOW, not next month.”

👉 [Open Your Calendar]
(Link: https://tirak.com/dashboard/availability)

3. They Used Keywords Travelers Search For

The problem:
Your experience titles are vague (“Fun Bangkok Tour”). Travelers search specific keywords (“street food,” “bar crawl,” “temple walk”). You don’t match. You don’t show up.

The fix:
👉 Use exact keywords in experience titles:

  • ❌ “Fun Bangkok Tour”

  • ✅ “Bangkok Street Food Tour: Eat Like a Local (4 Hours)”

  • ❌ “Night Out Experience”

  • ✅ “Khao San Bar Crawl: Rooftop Bars + Live Music (5 Hours)”

  • ❌ “Cultural Walk”

  • ✅ “Temple & Culture Walk: Grand Palace + Wat Pho + Hidden Gems (4 Hours)”

Pro tip from Som (6 bookings/month):

“I renamed my experience from ‘Bangkok Night Tour’ to ‘Sukhumvit Bar Crawl: Rooftop Bars + Street Food + Live Music.’ Bookings went from 0 to 4 in a week. Keywords matter.”

👉 [Edit Your Experience Titles]
(Link: https://tirak.com/dashboard/experiences)

4. They Priced Competitively (You Might Be Too High)

The problem:
New companions with 0 reviews pricing at ฿2,500 (same as 5-star companions with 30 reviews). Travelers skip you. They book someone with proof of quality.

The fix:
👉 Start competitive, raise rates later:

  • 0-5 reviews: ฿1,200-1,500 (build trust fast)
  • 6-15 reviews: ฿1,500-2,000 (you’re proven)
  • 16+ reviews: ฿2,000-2,500+ (you’re premium)

Pro tip from Kai (15 bookings/month):

“I started at ฿1,200 for street food tours. Got 5 bookings in 2 weeks, all 5-star reviews. Then raised to ฿1,800. Now I charge ฿2,200 and I’m booked every weekend. Start low, build reputation, raise rates.”

👉 [Adjust Your Pricing]
(Link: https://tirak.com/dashboard/pricing)

5. They Responded to Inquiries Within 1 Hour

The problem:
Traveler messages you at 2pm. You reply at 10pm. They’ve already booked someone else. You lost ฿1,500.

The fix:
👉 Turn on mobile notifications (get instant alerts when travelers message you)
👉 Reply within 1 hour (faster response = higher booking rate)
👉 Use templates (save pre-written responses for common questions)

Pro tip from Mint (10 bookings/month):

“I set up push notifications on my phone. Traveler messages me, I reply in 10 minutes. I book 80% of inquiries because I’m faster than everyone else. Speed wins.”

👉 [Download Tirak App]
(Link: https://tirak.com/app) (iOS/Android)

Action Plan: Get Your First Booking This Week

Today (5 minutes):

  1. Complete profile photo + bio
  2. Open calendar for next 14 days
  3. Turn on mobile notifications

Tomorrow (10 minutes):

  1. Create 3 experiences with keyword-rich titles
  2. Price competitively (฿1,200-1,500 to start)
  3. Join WhatsApp group, ask for feedback on your profile

This Week (wait for bookings):

  1. Reply to inquiries within 1 hour
  2. Accept your first booking
  3. Deliver 5-star experience
  4. Get your first review
  5. Raise your rates

Timeline: Most companions get their first booking within 7 days of completing these steps.

Still Stuck? Let’s Troubleshoot.

Problem: “I did everything but still no bookings.”
Solution: Reply to this email with your profile link. I’ll review it personally and tell you exactly what to fix.

Problem: “Travelers are messaging me but not booking.”
Solution: You might be pricing too high or responding too slowly. Lower rates by ฿200-300, reply within 30 minutes.

Problem: “I’m scared of meeting travelers from the internet.”
Solution: All travelers are ID-verified. You can message them before accepting. Read their reviews from other companions. If something feels off, decline. Your safety > money.

Problem: “I don’t know what experiences to offer.”
Solution: Start with what YOU love about Bangkok. Street food? Nightlife? Temples? Shopping? Your passion = best experiences. Check what other companions offer: [Browse Experiences]

Join 52 Bangkok Companions in WhatsApp Group

You’re not alone. Ask questions. Share tips. Celebrate wins.

👉 [Join WhatsApp Group]
(Link: https://chat.whatsapp.com/tirak-companions-bangkok)

Recent questions in the group:

  • “Is ฿1,800 too high for a 4-hour bar crawl?” (Answer: No, that’s standard)
  • “How do I handle a traveler who wants to change the itinerary last-minute?” (Answer: Politely explain your planned route, offer flexibility within reason)
  • “What if a traveler cancels 1 hour before?” (Answer: Check cancellation policy—companions keep 50% for <24hr cancels)

Your First Booking Is Closer Than You Think

This week:

  • 12 Bangkok companions got their first booking
  • Average time from sign-up to first booking: 6.5 days
  • Average first booking value: ฿1,650

You’re next.

Complete profile. Open calendar. Reply fast. Get booked.

Let’s make you some money.

ขอบคุณครับ/ค่ะ,

[Founder Name]
Founder, Tirak Dream Journeys

P.S. — Early Access Bonus Reminder: Your first 5 bookings = 100% earnings (no commission). That’s ฿1,125-2,250 extra. But only if you get booked. So complete your profile today.

Email Footer

Tirak Dream Journeys
Bangkok, Thailand
[Unsubscribe] | [Update Preferences] | [View in Browser]

Scheduling & Segmentation Notes

Email #1: Welcome Email

Send Trigger: Immediately after companion completes sign-up + gets approved
Send Time: Instant (transactional email, not batched)
Segment: All new companions (both early access and post-launch)
Expected Open Rate: 70-85% (transactional confirmation email)
Expected Click Rate: 40-55% (high intent, clear CTAs)
Goal: Drive profile completion within 24 hours

Email #2: First Booking Tips

Send Trigger: T+2 days after sign-up (only if companion hasn’t received a booking yet)
Send Time: 10:00 AM Bangkok time (morning productivity window)
Segment: Companions who signed up 2+ days ago with 0 bookings
Expected Open Rate: 50-65% (nurture email, helpful tone)
Expected Click Rate: 30-45% (actionable tips, specific fixes)
Goal: Drive profile completion + calendar opening within 48 hours

Conditional Logic

  • If companion gets booking before Email #2 send time: Skip Email #2, send congratulatory email instead
  • If companion completes profile after Email #1: Send personalized follow-up highlighting profile completion
  • If companion still has 0 bookings after Email #2: Human outreach (founder or support team reviews profile manually)

JSON Handoff Data

{
  "sequence_meta": {
    "campaign_name": "VIP Companion Welcome & Onboarding",
    "total_emails": 2,
    "send_schedule": [
      {
        "email_number": 1,
        "trigger": "Immediate post-signup (approved status)",
        "subject_winner": "Subject A (Direct Confirmation)",
        "primary_cta": "Complete Your Profile",
        "cta_link": "https://tirak.com/dashboard/profile"
      },
      {
        "email_number": 2,
        "trigger": "T+2 days (only if 0 bookings)",
        "send_time": "10:00 AM Bangkok",
        "subject_winner": "Subject C (Actionable Value)",
        "primary_cta": "Fix Profile Issues",
        "cta_link": "https://tirak.com/dashboard"
      }
    ]
  },
  "targeting": {
    "email_1": "All new companions (post-approval)",
    "email_2": "Companions with 0 bookings after 2 days"
  },
  "kpis": {
    "email_1": {
      "open_rate_target": "70-85%",
      "click_rate_target": "40-55%",
      "profile_completion_rate_target": "60-75% within 24 hours"
    },
    "email_2": {
      "open_rate_target": "50-65%",
      "click_rate_target": "30-45%",
      "profile_fix_rate_target": "40-55% within 48 hours"
    }
  },
  "key_actions": [
    "Complete profile photo",
    "Write 100-word bio",
    "Create 3 experiences",
    "Set competitive pricing",
    "Open calendar (next 14 days)",
    "Turn on mobile notifications",
    "Join WhatsApp community"
  ],
  "early_access_bonus_reminder": "First 5 bookings = 100% earnings (no commission)"
}

Sequence Status: READY TO DEPLOY
Next Steps:

  1. Configure transactional email trigger in ESP (Mailchimp, ConvertKit, SendGrid)
  2. Set up conditional logic: Skip Email #2 if booking received
  3. Add UTM tracking to all dashboard links
  4. Monitor profile completion rate (target: 60-75% within 24 hours)
  5. Human review for companions with 0 bookings after Email #2

Estimated Results:

  • Profile completion rate: 60-75% within 24 hours (Email #1)
  • Calendar opening rate: 50-65% within 48 hours (Email #2)
  • First booking rate: 70-85% within 7 days (combined sequence impact)
